brand_identity.positioning: Your trusted clinic for spinal and movement care. Holistic, multi-disciplinary, and family-oriented.
brand_identity.tone: Approachable, calm, reliable, and deeply professional. Avoids jargon, prioritizes clarity and warmth.
brand_identity.core_promise: Helping people stop organizing their lives around pain through individualized care plans and combined therapy.
brand_identity.energy: Serene and encouraging. Provides security and hope based on real clinical experience.

target_personas.segment: Active Families & Individuals in Gold Coast
pain_points: Back, neck, shoulder and hip pain
Frustration with 'quick fixes' or medication-only solutions

strategic_pillars_logic.educational: Educate first to help patients understand the 'why' of their pain.
strategic_pillars_logic.beliefs: Respectfully confront myths like 'pain is normal for my age'.
